backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting three implemented features: removing the Active Tournaments section from HomePage, propagating admin-created tournaments to TournamentsPage via localStorage polling, and reflecting slot count updates in near real-time across tabs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source files to short summaries describing each file's role and key implementation details, serving as a build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Tailwind base/components/utilities and defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React app with a root div and a module script loading main.tsx, titled 'GenZe Esports'.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main app component that sets up TanStack Router with all public and admin routes, calls seedData() on mount to initialize empty localStorage arrays, and renders the router provider.
frontend/src/components/AdminRoute.tsx: Route guard component that redirects unauthenticated users to the admin login page by checking localStorage session via isAdminLoggedIn().
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with brand logo, tagline, social media icon links, quick navigation links, and a copyright notice.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Sticky top navigation bar with desktop nav links, an admin login button, and a mobile hamburger menu with active-link highlighting.
frontend/src/components/StatsCounter.tsx: Displays animated count-up statistics (players, tournaments, prize pool) using an IntersectionObserver to trigger the animation when the component enters the viewport.
frontend/src/components/TournamentCard.t: Renders a styled card for a tournament showing game type, entry fee, prize pool, slots, and a register button that navigates to the registration page.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via a React context and custom hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder file indicating that all data operations are handled via localStorage through seedData utilities, with no backend query hooks defined.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports gaming fonts (Orbitron, Rajdhani, Inter), defines CSS custom properties for a dark gaming theme, and provides utility classes for neon glow effects and styled components.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminLoginPage.tsx: Admin login page with hardcoded credentials that stores a session in localStorage and redirects to the admin dashboard on successful authentication.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanelPage.tsx: Admin dashboard page with tabs for managing tournaments, players, and payments, including CRUD operations and localStorage-based data persistence. Dispatches storage events to sync state across browser tabs.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Contact page displaying email, phone, and social media info alongside a simple contact form that shows a success message on submission.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing/home page featuring a hero section with animated particles, CTA buttons linking to tournaments and registration, and a stats counter component.
frontend/src/pages/LeaderboardPage.tsx: Leaderboard page that displays approved players filtered by game type (All/Free Fire/PUBG), with a top-3 podium and ranked list pulled from localStorage.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentPage.tsx: Payment submission page where players upload a UPI payment screenshot for a specific tournament registration, saving the payment record to localStorage with a pending status.
frontend/src/pages/RegisterPage.tsx: Player registration form page that validates input, creates a new Player record in localStorage, increments tournament slot counts, and dispatches storage events for real-time sync across tabs.
frontend/src/pages/TournamentsPage.tsx: Displays active tournaments with game-type filtering, refreshing data via localStorage polling every 3 seconds and storage events to reflect real-time slot and tournament updates.
frontend/src/utils/seedData.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces for Tournament, Player, and Payment, and provides localStorage CRUD helpers plus an incrementTournamentSlots utility and admin session check.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with gaming-specific fonts (Orbitron, Rajdhani), neon color tokens, custom box shadows, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks project version, existing implemented features, and pending feature requests for the Tournament Arena app, focusing on real-time tournament visibility and slot count synchronization via localStorage.
